Profile

Creative product designer with 6+ years of experience crafting user-centered digital experiences. Passionate about bridging the gap between business goals and user needs through research-driven design.

Experience

Senior Product Designer — TechCorp Inc. San Francisco, CA 2021-03 – Present
  • Led redesign of core product, increasing user retention by 34%
  • Managed a team of 3 junior designers across 2 product lines
  • Established design system used by 40+ engineers
UI/UX Designer — StartupXYZ Remote 2018-06 – 2021-02
  • Designed mobile app from 0→1, achieving 4.8★ App Store rating
  • Conducted 50+ user interviews to inform product decisions

B.F.A., Interaction Design — California College of the Arts 2014 – 2018
